The expectation of a delayed Fed rate cut, as indicated by the hot inflation report, may strengthen the US dollar, putting downward pressure on EUR_USD. This is because higher interest rates in the US can attract more foreign investment, increasing demand for the dollar.

Geopolitical tensions (Iran conflict) could weigh on UK economic outlook, increasing safe-haven demand for USD and pressuring GBP. The ranging trend may break to the downside.

The potential dramatic effect of the Iran war on the UK economy, as reported by Faisal Islam, may lead to a decrease in investor confidence and subsequently a decline in the value of GBP, causing GBP_USD to fall.
